description: Install dependencies (framer-motion, lucide-react) and update globals.css with the design system foundation - keyframe animations, refined CSS variables, and agent/artifact color tokens.
steps: Update src/app/globals.css to add the 4 CSS keyframe animations specified in design.md: pulse-glow, flow-dash, gradient-shift, breathe
Add agent color CSS variables to :root in globals.css: --agent-senior (#3b82f6), --agent-security (#ef4444), --agent-performance (#f59e0b), --agent-product (#8b5cf6)

Add artifact type color CSS variables: --artifact-decision (#22c55e), --artifact-risk (#ef4444), --artifact-assumption (#f59e0b), --artifact-tradeoff (#8b5cf6), --artifact-open-question (#06b6d4), --artifact-recommendation (#3b82f6)
Add the refined color palette variables from design.md: Background #030712, Surface #111827, Surface-elevated #1f2937, Border #374151, Text-primary #f9fafb, Text-secondary #9ca3af, Text-muted #6b7280
Add prefers-reduced-motion media query that disables all animations
Update the @theme inline block to include the new agent and artifact color tokens so they work with Tailwind 4
acceptance_criteria: framer-motion and lucide-react are in package.json dependencies
globals.css contains all 4 keyframe animations (pulse-glow, flow-dash, gradient-shift, breathe)
globals.css contains agent color variables and artifact type color variables
A prefers-reduced-motion media query is present that disables animations
npm run build succeeds without errors
findings: Prisma client generation (npx prisma generate) is required before build succeeds - not related to this feature but needed for verification. Pre-existing lint errors (33 issues) exist in test files and lib files - none introduced by this change.
